title: Boundary-Value Problems (2BP)

prerequisites.text: MAM1031F and MAM1032S or equivalent; MAM1043H; MAM1044H; MAM2010F; MAM2011F; and MAM2040F.

outline: Topics include: homogeneous and non-homogeneous boundary-value problems; Sturm–Liouville problems; partial differential equations and their solution via separation of variables; Fourier series; Green's functions; eigenfunction expansions.
dp_requirements: A class record of 30% or more; satisfactory attendance at lectures and tutorials; submission of all assigned work.
assessment: Class record counts up to 50%; the balance is made up by the final examination.
